title: Unusual Money
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation leading to a zero-coupon bond being mispriced as a stablecoin
funds_lost: Hundreds of millions in user funds

prevention.rule: Block any tx that updates the price of a token to a fixed value without market validation

summary: Usual Money protocol manipulated the oracle to misprice USD0++ as a stablecoin, leading to users losing hundreds of millions of dollars when the true value was revealed.
